
```tsx
function App() {
  const [weather, setWeather] = React.useState(null);
  const [location, setLocation] = React.useState("New York");
  const [loading, setLoading] = React.useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = React.useState(null);
  const [unit, setUnit] = React.useState("metric");

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const fetchWeather = async () => {
      setLoading(true);
      setError(null);

      try {
        const response = await fetch(
          `https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=40.7128&longitude=-74.0060&current=temperature_2m,weather_code,wind_speed_10m,relative_humidity_2m&temperature_unit=${unit === "metric" ? "celsius" : "fahrenheit"}`
        );
        const data = await response.json();

        if (data.current) {
          setWeather(data.current);
        } else {
          setError("Unable to fetch weather data");
        }
      } catch (err) {
        setError("Failed to fetch weather data. Please try again.");
        console.error(err);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    fetchWeather();
  }, [unit]);

  const getWeatherDescription = (code) => {
    const weatherCodes = {
      0: "Clear sky",
      1: "Mainly clear",
      2: "Partly cloudy",
      3: "Overcast",
      45: "Foggy",
      48: "Foggy with rime",
      51: "Light drizzle",
      53: "Moderate drizzle",
      55: "Dense drizzle",
      61: "Slight rain",
      63: "Moderate rain",
      65: "Heavy rain",
      71: "Slight snow",
      73: "Moderate snow",
      75: "Heavy snow",
      77: "Snow grains",
      80: "Slight rain showers",
      81: "Moderate rain showers",
      82: "Violent rain showers",
      85: "Slight snow showers",
      86: "Heavy snow showers",
      95: "Thunderstorm",
      96: "Thunderstorm with hail",
      99: "Thunderstorm with hail",
    };
    return weatherCodes[code] || "Unknown";
  };

  const getWeatherIcon = (code) => {
    if (code === 0)
      return "☀️";
    if (code <= 3) return "🌤️";
    if (code === 45 || code === 48) return "🌫️";
    if (code <= 82) return "🌧️";
    if (code <= 86) return "❄️";
    return "⛈️";
  };

  const styles = `
    :root {
      --color-surface: #1e293b;
      --color-text: #e2e8f0;
      --color-accent: #3b82f6;
    }

    * {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, sans-serif;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e293b 0%, #0f172a 100%);
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 20px;
    }

    .weather-container {
      background: var(--color-surface);
      border-radius: 16px;
      padding: 32px;
      max-width: 500px;
      width: 100%;
      box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
      color: var(--color-text);
    }

    .header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .title {
      font-size: 28px;
      font-weight: bold;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--color-accent) 0%, #60a5fa 100%);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
    }

    .unit-toggle {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
      background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1);
      padding: 6px;
      border-radius: 8px;
    }

    .unit-btn {
      padding: 6px 12px;
      border: none;
      background: transparent;
      color: var(--color-text);
      cursor: pointer;
      border-radius: 6px;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 600;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }

    .unit-btn.active {
      background: var(--color-accent);
      color: white;
    }

    .unit-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2);
    }

    .location-input {
      width: 100%;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      border: 2px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3);
      border-radius: 8px;
      background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.5);
      color: var(--color-text);
      font-size: 14px;
      transition: border-color 0.3s;
    }

    .location-input:focus {
      outline: none;
      border-color: var(--color-accent);
    }

    .location-input::placeholder {
      color: rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.5);
    }

    .weather-display {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 24px 0;
    }

    .weather-icon {
      font-size: 80px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      display: block;
    }

    .temperature {
      font-size: 48px;
      font-weight: bold;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      color: var(--color-accent);
    }

    .weather-description {
      font-size: 18px;
      color: rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.8);
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .weather-details {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 16px;
    }

    .detail-item {
      background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1);
      padding: 16px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2);
    }

    .detail-label {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.6);
      margin-bottom: 4px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    }

    .detail-value {
      font-size: 20px;
      font-weight: bold;
      color: var(--color-accent);
    }

    .loading {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 40px;
      color: rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.6);
    }

    .spinner {
      display: inline-block;
      width: 40px;
      height: 40px;
      border: 4px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2);
      border-top: 4px solid var(--color-accent);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
    }

    @keyframes spin {
      0% {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
      }
      100% {
        transform: rotate(360deg);
      }
    }

    .error {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1);
      border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3);
      color: #fca5a5;
      padding: 16px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .location-name {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.6);
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .weather-container {
        padding: 20px;
      }

      .title {
        font-size: 24px;
      }

      .temperature {
        font-size: 40px;
      }

      .weather-icon {
        font-size: 60px;
      }

      .weather-details {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }
    }
  `;

  return (
    <>
      <style>{styles}</style>
      <div className="weather-container">
        <div className="header">
          <h1 className="title">Weather App</h1>
          <div className="unit-toggle">
            <button
              className={`unit-btn ${unit === "metric" ? "active" : ""}`}
              onClick={() => setUnit("metric")}
            >
              °C
            </button>
            <button
              className={`unit-btn ${unit === "imperial" ? "active" : ""}`}
              onClick={() => setUnit("imperial")}
            >
              °F
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <input
          type="text"
          className="location-input"
          placeholder="Enter city name..."
          value={location}
          onChange={(e) => setLocation(e.target.value)}
        />

        {error && <div className="error">{error}</div>}

        {loading ? (
          <div className="loading">
            <div className="spinner"></div>
            <p style={{ marginTop: "16px" }}>Fetching weather data...</p>
          </div>
        ) : weather ? (
          <div className="weather-display">
            <div className="location-name">{location}</div>
            <span className="weather-icon">
              {getWeatherIcon(weather.weather_code)}
            </span>
            <div className="temperature">
              {Math.round(weather.temperature_2m)}°
              {unit === "metric" ? "C" : "F"}
            </div>
            <div className="weather-description">
              {getWeatherDescription(weather.weather_code)}
            </div>
            <div className="weather-details">
              <div className="detail-item">
                <div className="detail-label">Wind Speed</div>
                <div className="detail-value">
                  {Math.round(weather.wind_speed_10m)}
                  {unit === "metric" ? " km/h" : " mph"}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="detail-item">
                <div className="detail-label">Humidity</div>
                <div className="detail-value">{weather.relative_humidity_2m}%</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

export default App;
```
